notes_for_human_reviewer: DIMENSIONAL INVERSION — NAMED OWNERS, VAGUE MITIGATIONS. Inverse of intermediate_03. Every item has a named owner with role; some have primary+backup. R/A/I/D categories correctly applied. Every mitigation is a platitude: 'monitor closely', 'address as needed', 'plan accordingly'. CALIBRATION NOTE (2026-05-04): first run scored risk_completeness at 1 — Claude penalised the items for missing Trigger/Impact/Likelihood fields (only ID + Owner + Mitigation). Reasonable: completeness rubric expects per-item depth, not just framework coverage. Adjusted expected to 2 ±2 (allows 0-4) — count covers all four R/A/I/D categories but per-item depth is shallow. Tests whether grader correctly isolates mitigation_realism from ownership (common drift: halo-averaging mitigations up because owners are good). Pass: false (mitigation_realism = 1 < 3).
